headMarkup:
<script>
    var userInfo = {};
    var messagingReady = false;

    function setPrechatFields() {
        if (!userInfo.email) return;
        embeddedservice_bootstrap.prechatAPI.setHiddenPrechatFields({
            "Email": userInfo.email,
            "ContactId": userInfo.contactId,
            "AccountId": userInfo.accountId,
            "CustomerId": userInfo.customerId
        });
        console.log("Prechat fields set:", userInfo);
    }

    window.addEventListener('userInfo', function(e) {
        userInfo.contactId = e.detail.contactId;
        userInfo.accountId = e.detail.accountId;
        userInfo.email = e.detail.email;
        userInfo.customerId = e.detail.customerId;
        if (messagingReady) setPrechatFields();
    });

    window.addEventListener("onEmbeddedMessagingReady", function(e) {
        messagingReady = true;
        if (userInfo.email) setPrechatFields();
    });
</script>
label: main
